lines.english: Bai Ying'ai, what day of the week is September 12th?
Really? How old are you this year?
How about I treat you to a meal on Thursday?
That's great! Thank you, thank you.
Do you like to eat Chinese food or American food?
I'm British, but I like to eat Chinese food.

vocabulary.definition: (measure word for position in a numerical series, day of the month)

example_sentence.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example_sentence.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

vocabulary.definition: to give birth to, to be born

example_sentence.en: Say this to find out someone's age.
Say this to find out someone's age.
Say this to find out someone's age.

example_sentence.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example_sentence.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.
I will treat you to dinner.

vocabulary.definition: Is it OK? How is that? How does that sound?

example_sentence.cn: 今天晚上我请你和你妹妹吃美国菜，怎么样？
example_sentence.py: Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒ qǐng nǐ hé nǐ mèimei chī Měiguó cài, zěnmeyàng?
example_sentence.en: I'll treat you and your younger sister to American food tonight. How about it?

example_sentence.cn: 他(是)喜欢吃中国菜还是喜欢吃美国菜?
example_sentence.py: Tā (shì) xǐhuan chī Zhōngguó cài háishi xǐhuan chī Měiguó cài?
example_sentence.en: Does he like to eat Chinese or American food?

example_sentence.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example_sentence.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example_sentence.cn: 你哥哥是老师还是学生?
example_sentence.py: Nǐ gēge shì lǎoshī háishi xuésheng?
example_sentence.en: Is your older brother a teacher or a student?

vocabulary.definition: o'clock (lit. dot, point, thus "points on the clock")

database_items.original_text: 白英爱,九月十二号是星期几?
database_items.original_pinyin: Bái Yīng'ài jiǔyuè shí'èr hào shì xīngqījǐ
standard_answers: Bai Ying'ai, what day of the week is September 12th?

database_items.original_text: 我星期四请你吃饭,怎么样?
database_items.original_pinyin: wǒ xīngqīsì qǐng nǐ chīfàn zěnmeyàng
standard_answers: How about I treat you to a meal on Thursday?

database_items.original_text: 你喜欢吃中国菜还是美国菜?

database_items.original_text: 我是英国人,可是我喜欢吃中国菜。

database_items.original_text: Really? How old are you this year?
Is Wang Peng a student or a teacher?

video_global_config.visual_style: Vibrant and warm 3D Pixar style, with soft lighting and detailed textures, reminiscent of modern animated family films. The color palette is bright and inviting.

character_definitions.name: 高文中
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A friendly-looking young Asian male, around 18 years old, with short, neat black hair, expressive dark eyes, and a warm smile. He wears a casual blue hoodie and jeans.

character_definitions.name: 白英爱
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A cheerful young Caucasian female, around 18 years old, with long, wavy blonde hair, bright blue eyes, and a curious expression. She wears a stylish pink sweater and a light scarf.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 在一个阳光明媚的大学校园咖啡馆里，高文中看着手机上的日历，然后抬头好奇地问白英爱一个关于日期的问题。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. A young Asian male (Gao Wenzhong) and a young Caucasian female (Bai Ying'ai) are sitting at a small wooden table in a bright, modern university campus cafe. Sunlight streams through large windows, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Gao Wenzhong looks at his smartphone displaying a calendar, then turns to Bai Ying'ai with a curious expression. Medium shot, shallow depth of field.

voice_over.content: 白英爱, 九月十二号是星期几?
voice_over.pinyin: Bái Yīng'ài, jiǔyuè shí'èr hào shì xīngqījǐ?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中听到答案后，开心地宣布那天是他的生日。一个可爱的卡通生日蛋糕图标在他头顶上方短暂出现并闪烁。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Close-up on Gao Wenzhong's face as he smiles happily. A whimsical, stylized birthday cake icon with a lit candle briefly pops up above his head with a subtle sparkle effect. The background is the soft-focused cafe. The lighting is warm and celebratory.

voice_over.pinyin: Nà tiān shì wǒ de shēngrì.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中做出一个热情邀请的手势，提议请白英爱吃饭。白英爱则露出惊喜又高兴的表情，连连点头。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Two-shot of Gao Wenzhong and Bai Ying'ai at the cafe table. Gao Wenzhong makes a friendly, inviting gesture with his hands, leaning forward slightly. Bai Ying'ai's face lights up with a surprised and delighted expression, her eyes wide as she nods enthusiastically. The camera is at eye level, capturing their positive interaction.

voice_over.content: 我星期四请你吃饭, 怎么样?
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ xīngqīsì qǐng nǐ chīfàn, zěnmeyàng?

screen_overlay.sub_text: To treat you to a meal

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 画面分割成两半，动态展示两种美食选择。左边是热气腾腾的中国菜，右边是经典的美国菜。白英爱的手从画面下方伸出，指向中国菜。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Dynamic split-screen effect. On the left, a vibrant, steaming spread of delicious Chinese food (dumplings, kung pao chicken) on traditional porcelain. On the right, a classic American meal (juicy hamburger, golden fries). Bai Ying'ai's hand enters from the bottom of the frame and points decisively towards the Chinese food side. Graphic and visually engaging.

voice_over.content: 我是英国人, 可是我喜欢吃中国菜。
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ shì Yīngguó rén, kěshì wǒ xǐhuān chī Zhōngguó cài.

screen_overlay.main_text: 中国菜 (Zhōngguó cài) 还是 (háishì) 美国菜 (Měiguó cài)?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 场景切换到一个温馨的中餐馆。高文中指着墙上一个漂亮的中国风时钟，时钟的指针清晰地指向七点半。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Gao Wenzhong and Bai Ying'ai are seated in a cozy, warmly lit Chinese restaurant decorated with red lanterns. Gao Wenzhong points to a beautiful, ornate wall clock with Chinese numerals. The camera zooms in to show the clock hands clearly pointing to 7:30. The atmosphere is cheerful.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 两人站在中餐馆门口，在夜晚柔和的灯光下愉快地挥手告别。背景是灯火阑珊的城市夜景。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Exterior shot at night, in front of the charming Chinese restaurant entrance. The restaurant's neon sign casts a warm glow. Gao Wenzhong and Bai Ying'ai are smiling and waving goodbye to each other. The city street in the background has a soft, out-of-focus bokeh effect. Wide shot, cinematic and heartwarming feel.
